claims.summary: The fixed-seed projection matrix must stay deterministic.
claims.rationale: Projection determinism and fixed-kernel checksum behavior are already test-pinned in `codec.rs`.

claims.summary: Smoothstep vibrancy should remain gentle at the entropy gate rather than popping.
claims.rationale: `vibrancy_from_entropy_matches_inline_smoothstep` and adjacent tests pin the smoothstep curve used by `apply_spectral_feedback_inner`.

claims.summary: Tail/vibrancy dims can exceed `FEATURE_ABS_MAX` only under the bounded raised ceiling.
claims.rationale: Existing codec overflow tests distinguish ordinary hard clipping from tail/vibrancy raised-ceiling behavior while preserving bounded delivery.
